VII. International Spiritual Psychology Symposium Hosted by Our University

16.05.2022

VII. The International Symposium on Spiritual Psychology was held on Saturday-Sunday, May 14-15, at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

Organized in cooperation with Ibn Haldun University, Erciyes University and the Ministry of National Education, General Directorate of Special Education and Guidance Services, VII. The International Symposium on Spiritual Psychology was held on Saturday-Sunday, May 14-15, at the Ibn Haldun University Complex.

In the symposium, many experts from our country and the world presented papers.

You can follow the symposium opening ceremony and sessions on the attached Youtube playlist.
